description: You are the procurement manager at GAEC JOULIN. Log in to Ekylibre at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678. Record purchase invoices dated 2024-01-20 for three distinct suppliers already in the system, covering seeds, fertilizer, and phytosanitary products. Ensure at least two of these invoices are validated to generate accounting journal entries.
